title: visual plus+
description:
Сборка для улучшения опыта игры, а так же для игры на серверах с максимальным количеством возможностей и красоты

Build to improve the game experience, as well as to play on servers with maximum features and beauty
body:
Minecraft Visual+ is a client-side modpack focused on visual enhancements, quality-of-life (QoL) improvements, and performance optimization, while keeping the vanilla gameplay experience completely intact.

It transforms Minecraft into a more modern, immersive, and polished experience with smooth animations, improved UI, shaders, dynamic lighting, and rich visual effects — all while maintaining high FPS and strong mod compatibility.

✨ Key Features

🎨 Visual Enhancements

3D skin layers and improved player customization
Shaders support (Iris) with better lighting and shadows
Enhanced particles, weather effects, and animations
Dynamic world visuals: mobs, items, and environment animations
Redesigned UI and menus (FancyMenu, ImmersiveUI, SmoothGui)

⚡ Performance & Optimization

Sodium + Lithium + FerriteCore for high FPS
EntityCulling and More Culling to reduce rendering load
ImmediatelyFast for faster UI and rendering performance
Optimized loading, smoother gameplay, and quick quitting
Debugify for vanilla bug fixes

🧭 Quality-of-Life Improvements

BetterF3 and Better Statistics Screen for advanced info
Mouse Tweaks and Item Swapper for smoother inventory control
Shulker Box Tooltip for quick item previews
Roughly Enough Items (REI) for crafting and recipes
Mod Menu for easy mod management

🎧 Immersion & Atmosphere

Sound Physics Remastered for realistic sound behavior
LambDynamicLights for dynamic light sources
Reactive Music for adaptive in-game music
Enhanced particles and visual effects (Visuality, Particle Effects)

🌍 World & Content Enhancements

Terralith for expanded and redesigned biomes
Friends & Foes adding new mobs
Farmer’s Delight and expansions for deeper farming gameplay
Traveler’s Backpack for improved survival utility
Moog’s Nether Structures for new Nether content

🎥 Camera & Controls

CameraOverhaul, FirstPerson, Shoulder Surfing Reloaded
Zoomify for advanced zoom functionality
Controlify for controller support
